message:
fix(abi): apply comment/malformed-line skipping loop to non-reentrant fgetspent and fgetpwent

- Wrap the single-line read in the non-reentrant fgetspent() in the same
  loop pattern applied to fgetspent_r in the previous commit, skipping
  empty lines, comment lines, and malformed entries instead of returning
  NULL on the first non-matching line
- Apply the same looping fix to fgetpwent() for consistency with the
  reentrant fgetpwent_r variant
- Update ABI tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
